name: Kids' 6pc Basic Tray New Colors - Pillowfort™: Multicolor Divided Plates, Dishwasher & Microwave Safe
description: Bring a fun refresh to your child's mealtimes with this 6-Piece Basic Trays from Pillowfort™. Made from BPA-free plastic, these rectangular trays feature two rectangular sections to ensure different food items don't mix, making them great for picky eaters. One round section adds convenience to carry a beverage cup or other snacks, while the raised sides make holding or carrying a breeze. Microwave safe for reheating food only, you can toss them in the dishwasher for easy cleanup. Featuring assorted colors in shades of navy, blue, mint green, pink, peach and yellow, they're sure to add a fun pop of color to mealtimes.
